ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: assimp/assimp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/assimp/assimp
Language: c++
The official Open-Asset-Importer-Library Repository. Loads 40+ 3D-file-formats into one unified and clean data structure.

Ceph is a distributed object, block, and file storage platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jrouwe/JoltPhysics
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jrouwe/JoltPhysics
Language: c++
A multi core friendly rigid body physics and collision detection library. Written in C++. Suitable for games and VR applications. Used by Horizon Forbidden West and Death Stranding 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mixxxdj/mixxx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mixxxdj/mixxx
Language: c++
Mixxx is Free DJ software that gives you everything you need to perform live mixes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moonlight-stream/moonlight-qt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moonlight-stream/moonlight-qt
Language: c++
GameStream client for PCs (Windows, Mac, Linux, and Steam Link)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: organicmaps/organicmaps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/organicmaps/organicmaps
Language: c++
🍃 Organic Maps is a free Android & iOS offline maps app for more than 6M travelers, tourists, hikers, and cyclists. It uses crowd-sourced OpenStreetMap data and is developed with love by the community. No ads, no tracking, no data collection, no crapware. Please donate to support the development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadps4-emu/shadPS4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadps4-emu/shadPS4
Language: c++
PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux, macOS and FreeBSD written in C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: twelvesec/PwnPad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twelvesec/PwnPad
Language: c++
PwnPad is an affordable, hands-on hardware hacking platform built for practical learning. It features a range of challenges that walk users through key hardware security concepts, from PCB design to side-channel attacks.
